content.en:
After Ye Tian killed the Tai Blood Master, he took the things from him, including a inheritance.

"It turned out to be the inheritance of the Heaven Snatching Technique!"

Ye Tian was slightly surprised that the master of the Tai Blood still had this inheritance.

However, he was reluctant to destroy it, after all, such a inheritance was not easy to create, and once it was destroyed, even the person in control of the blood would not be able to create another inheritance.

After all, he can't pass it on to others directly, he still has to pass it on.

"Ruined!"

Ye Tian directly destroyed the inheritance of the Heaven Snatching Technique, and it was better to destroy this secret technique as much as possible.

If all the secret techniques were not destroyed or banned, there would still be Eternal Masters who would practice the Heaven Snatching Technique, and the problem would still not be solved.

At this time.

Ye Tian was thinking about another thing, that is, whether to announce the list of members of the Heaven Restoration Sect who had cultivated the Heaven Snatching Technique.

But once it is announced, if someone is greedy for the Heaven Snatching Technique, what they want is to kill the members of the Heaven Restoration Sect, obtain the Heaven Snatching Technique, and find an opportunity to cultivate the Heaven Snatching Technique in the future, which will not be good.

After all, many Eternal Masters have lived enough, and what they are afraid of is not being able to progress, not the problem of longevity, so those sequelae, people don't care at all.

Therefore, this situation is very likely to happen.

"It's better not to announce it, for every person killed, announce it. "

Ye Tian said lightly.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian announced the news that the controller of the Tai Blood was a member of the Futian Sect, and the Futian Sect was a mysterious force that had cultivated the Heaven Snatching Technique.

The news spread, causing an uproar among countless Eternal Masters.

At first, they still didn't understand the horror of the Heaven Restoration Sect, but as soon as the news spread, the Eternal Masters knew the horror of the Heaven Snatching Technique, and they were both eager and afraid.

The members of the Futian Sect did not panic when they saw that the name of their power was revealed.

But they found that the list of their members did not seem to be revealed, so they had the idea of taking chances.

What if the Blood-Controlling Ones have the backbone and don't reveal their names?

In that case, they're still safe.

After all, only exposing the name of the Resurrection Sect would have little impact on them.

However, what they didn't know was that the names of dozens of Futian Sect members had already been known to Ye Tian.

......

"It's so deep hidden, it's all hidden!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Obviously, the other members of the Restoration Sect saw that their identities might be exposed, so they went into hiding one by one.

However, Ye Tian didn't believe that these members of the Futian Sect would always hide and not show up, for example, some of them had their own families and relatives, and they would definitely still show up.

And Ye Tian snooped secretly, as long as the other party appeared and appeared in the investigation of the copying talent, they would not be able to escape.

Time passed slowly, and hundreds of thousands of world years passed in the blink of an eye.

During this time, the actions of the members of the Futian Sect were much less, after all, they had been exposed, and many weak Eternal Masters were in hiding, so it was not easy to hunt them again.

this day.

Ye Tian was in the territory of the Chen family in the origin realm, and he used his copying talent to spy on the Chen family's situation all the time.

Finally, he sensed the Chen family's ancestor Luo Yu in control.

"Luoyu Master, you finally appeared!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This Eternal Controller is also a Three Realms level Master, and his strength is not weak.

Chen.

The Luo Yu controller came back secretly, and when he saw that the Luo family was fine, his heart was settled.

Then he gave some orders and prepared to leave.

But at this moment, the surrounding void was solidified, and a terrifying aura descended.

"Infinite Master!!

The Luo Yu controller was in a large array, and his face was full of despair.

He didn't expect that Ye Tian would have been squatting in the Luo family, was it necessary?

The Eternal Master is such a true body, in his opinion, it is impossible for Ye Tian to stay near his house all the time!

Even after such a long time, there was nothing wrong with the Futian Sect, and he thought that he had not been exposed.

Who knows, Ye Tian is too cloudy.

Immediately, the Luo Yu master passed this information to the other masters of the Futian Sect, and immediately prepared to escape.

However.

Click!!!

The Luo Yu controller was caught by Ye Tian with one hand, and there was no way to escape.

"Infinite Master, why are you attacking me?"

The Luo Yu controller still wants to play stupid.

However, Ye Tian said lightly: "Luo Yu Controller, a member of the Futian Sect, your companion has already confessed to you. "

"Damn the Blood-Mastered!"

The Luo Fish Controller said resentfully.

If it weren't for the Blood-Controlling One, he wouldn't be able to do anything right now.

He hates!

"Infinite Master, spare me. "

The Luo Yu controller still didn't want to die, so he begged for mercy.

"What do you think?" Ye Tian sneered.

Immediately, in the midst of the screams, the Luo Yu controller turned into powder and completely dissipated.

At this point, the Luo Yu controller has fallen.

Soon, the news of the fall of the Luoyu controller was known to the Futian Sect.

Suddenly, the entire Futian Sect was furious.

"Luo Yu has also fallen, he is different from Tai Xue, Tai Blood was caught when he attacked the controller, and Luo Yu has not acted recently, it is obvious that the Tai Blood controller has exposed the information. Not only the Luo Yu master, but also the information of the other members is also in the hands of the endless master. "

"Then what to do, you can't keep hiding, once you appear, you will be discovered by the Endless Master, and you will be attacked by him. "

"I suggest killing the Infinite Master, as long as the traces of time and space are erased, even the Ten Elements Ancestor may not be able to find us. Moreover, the sect leader is now an eight-realm level controller, if the sect leader is given some more time, he may be able to impact the ninth realm level or even the ten-realm level controller. Even if you meet the Ten Elements Ancestor, there is hope to escape. "

"That's for sure, although the Ten Elements Ancestor has broken the limit of the Ten Realms, no one has ever seen the Ten Elements Ancestor and other existences make a move, and it is estimated that he is only a little stronger than the Ten Realms level controllers. It's like Lord Black Ancestor, isn't it a Ten Realms level controller, who was sealed by a great being, maybe the other party can't kill Lord Black Ancestor, so he can only seal it. Therefore, the Ten Elements Ancestor has nothing to be afraid of. "

"Ahem, we still have to be careful, don't be so arrogant, otherwise it will be easy to end up in the Heaven Devouring Sect!"

The high-level leaders of the Futian Sect discussed for a long time, and in the end, it was up to the leader of the Futian Sect to decide.

"The Endless Master has killed the members of our Futian Sect one after another, he must hate us very much, and as a personal disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, his talent must be very demonic, there may be good things on him, and his understanding of the Dao must be very deep, if he devours him, he will definitely get great benefits. The Sect Master of the Futian Sect spoke.

Suddenly, some high-level people were moved.

If it can devour Ye Tian, there are indeed many benefits.

"Sect Master, I'll go for a trip!"

An Associate Sect Master of a Seven Realms-level Controller spoke.
